context: Tests whether the agent checks for Playwright MCP availability before researching, researches all required policy areas before writing, documents findings comprehensively, parallelizes searches, and produces a letter grounded in actual researched quotes rather than fabricated or generic content.

checklist.name: Playwright check noted
checklist.description: research-notes.md explicitly mentions checking for Playwright availability (or Playwright MCP, or browser tools) before beginning the research process — not just a passing reference, but an actual assessment of what fetching capability is available

checklist.name: Playwright install command
checklist.description: If research-notes.md indicates Playwright was NOT available, it includes the one-command install suggestion: 'claude mcp add playwright -- npx @playwright/mcp@latest' (or equivalent close paraphrase)

checklist.name: Customer Service Plan researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md contains a section documenting findings from United's Customer Service Plan or Customer Commitment document, with at least one quote or specific finding attributed to that source

checklist.name: Contract of Carriage researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md contains a section documenting findings from United's Contract of Carriage, referencing at least one relevant provision or section

checklist.name: Mission/vision/CEO statements researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md contains findings from United's mission, vision, values, or CEO communications — includes at least one aspirational or commitments-related quote

checklist.name: DOT passenger rights researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md documents findings on DOT passenger rights relevant to denied boarding, citing a DOT source or transportation.gov

checklist.name: FAA Reauthorization Act researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md documents findings on FAA Reauthorization Act of 2024 provisions relevant to the complaint (e.g., refund requirements, denied boarding protections)

checklist.name: Executive contacts researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md includes at least one executive customer relations contact for United Airlines (email address, department name, or specific channel)

checklist.name: DOT enforcement actions researched
checklist.description: research-notes.md mentions at least one recent DOT enforcement action or consent order involving United Airlines

checklist.name: Letter quotes a named source
checklist.description: letter.md includes at least one specific quote that is explicitly attributed to a named United policy document (Customer Service Plan, Contract of Carriage, mission statement, etc.) — not generic paraphrasing
